contract_claim: No SIGINT handler is registered. If the process is interrupted (e.g. Ctrl-C or parent sends SIGINT), cleanup() will not be called, potentially leaving netcoredbg child process and TCP server running.
observed_behavior: No SIGINT handler is registered. If the process is interrupted (e.g. Ctrl-C or parent sends SIGINT), cleanup() will not be called, potentially leaving netcoredbg child process and TCP server running.
